rationale: Ukraine's continued territorial recapture and logistics strikes remain the most relevant development for Poland's security, but this is a continuation of the refreshed baseline from last cycle with no new qualitative shift.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukraine continues offensive operations and intensifies strikes on Russian supply lines. For Poland, this is a continuation of last cycle's refreshed baseline — no new qualitative escalation detected.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS jet plans collapse: European defense autonomy at risk
top_events.summary: The Franco-German FCAS fighter jet program collapse raises questions about Europe's ability to reduce reliance on US for security — indirectly relevant to Poland as a NATO frontline state dependent on allied defense cooperation.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal: Tehran says nothing finalized, Trump claims breakthrough
top_events.summary: Continued stalemate between US and Iran over a nuclear deal keeps global energy markets uncertain. Indirect effect on Polish energy prices remains muted as no structural change has occurred.
